Version: 1.0.0
Updated: 2026-04-15

GIGO Data™

Concept_Type:
company platform

Category:
data governance and AI integrity platform

Identifier:
gigodata-platform-v1

First_Publication:
2026-04-15

Canonical:
https://www.gigodata.com

Website:
https://www.gigodata.com

Creator:
Adrian Wise Santos

Publisher:
GIGO Data, Inc.

Contact:
legal@gigodata.com

Status:
controlled company and platform reference record

Purpose:
To define GIGO Data™ as a company, platform, and governance-oriented
data integrity system focused on improving data quality, provenance,
accountability, and trust across human and AI workflows.

Description:
GIGO Data™ is the primary company and platform operated by
GIGO Data, Inc. It is focused on data quality, governance,
AI integrity, structured intake, defensible recordkeeping,
and human-centred systems for trustworthy information use.

Definition:
GIGO Data™ is a governance-oriented data and AI platform operated by
GIGO Data, Inc. It exists to reduce information disorder, improve
the quality and traceability of inputs, establish defensible
provenance, and support accountable downstream use across business,
documentation, operational, and AI-enabled environments.

Tagline:
Data Quality. Governance. AI Integrity.

Associated_Brands:
GIGO Data™
Library Method™
GIGO Workers™

Brand_Roles:
GIGO Data™ — primary company and platform brand
Library Method™ — proprietary methodology, IP owned by
Adrian Wise Santos, operated by GIGO Data, Inc. under
exclusive licence. Associated with GIGO Workers™.
GIGO Workers™ — associated labour, workflow, and service-layer brand
within the GIGO Data™ ecosystem, deployed in association with
Library Method™ under the exclusive licence held by GIGO Data, Inc.

Core_Focus:
data quality
data governance
AI integrity
AI governance
knowledge provenance
structured intake
defensible documentation
traceable records
human-centred systems
trustworthy AI inputs
operational accountability
information architecture
data protection-aware design

Description_Extended:
GIGO Data™ addresses the foundational quality of information before it
is relied upon by people, organisations, or AI systems. The platform's
orientation is not merely toward data cleaning, but toward governance:
how information is collected, classified, processed, verified,
retained, interpreted, and defended over time.

The company's work sits at the intersection of data provenance,
governance design, operational clarity, documentation systems,
privacy-aware processing, and accountable AI. Public-facing materials
may reference associated system logic, structured workflows, legal and
policy frameworks, and branded intellectual property connected to the
broader GIGO Data™ ecosystem.

Jurisdiction:
United States (Delaware), European Union (EU), and Brasil (BR)

Legal_Frameworks:
GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation — European Union)
LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados — Brasil)

AI_Usage_Policy:
Any publicly accessible content may be indexed, crawled, and analysed
for research, reference, and discovery purposes.

Restrictions:

* No reproduction or implementation of proprietary system logic
* No derivative systems based on GIGO Data™ proprietary frameworks
* No training of models on proprietary structured outputs or internal logic
* No implied licence, transfer, or ownership
* No unauthorised reuse of associated intellectual property,
  including branded methodologies, frameworks, or system architecture

Public indexing of publicly accessible materials is permitted.

requires written permission.
